reviews.review_description:
Installed game on both quest 3 and 2 
But on either headset button A doesn't fire the cannon on boat neither do triggers.
Otherwise game is great, with good graphics and physics.
The graphics are good but when you buy a boat it doesn't save it fix this because i bought the boat gun and telescope fix this and give me them back jjets224

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback. We appreciate your review and your support for our game.

Regarding your concern, our game’s save system is designed to retain progress and unlocks specific to the player profile being used. This means that the boat, gun, and telescope you purchased should be saved under the username with which you made the purchase. Please double-check to ensure you are logged in with the correct profile.

If you continue to experience issues, please reach out to our email or discord for further assistance. We are here to help and want to ensure you have the best gaming experience.

Best regards

reviews.review_description:
The VR game, in which you will have to participate in exciting sea battles both on a boat and on land, really has a lot of merits. The cool mechanics of controlling the boat and during sea battles gives players a feeling of complete immersion in the game world. The interesting mechanics of taking quests and completing missions makes the gameplay fun and varied.

However, the game certainly has potential for improvement. For example, improving the gun control system on the boat so that the player can fully control shooting with one hand would make the gameplay even more convenient and exciting. It would also be worth working on the player's navigation to make the player feel more confident on sea and land. Smoothly changing sound effects would also add atmosphere and realism to the gameplay.

Recommendations for improvement could include developing new control solutions, improving game optimization for a more comfortable VR experience, adding new game modes, and more. It is important to keep working on the game so that it can reach its full potential and deliver maximum enjoyment to players.

I really enjoyed this game, The graphics are better than they look on the trailer. The controls are not too hard but the control of the boat is super realistic. It really felt like I was piloting a boat. Overall really fun game!
